birds.evidence: The southern carmine bee-eater (Merops nubicoides) is a species of bee-eater found across sub-equatorial Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellowish pipit (Anthus chii) is a species of bird in the family Motacillidae, the wagtails and pipits. It is found in Panama and in every mainland South American country except Ecuador and Chile.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Madagascar mannikin (Lepidopygia nana) is a common species of estrildid finch native to Madagascar
